query:
BEGIN;
INSERT INTO public.forum_room_topics (id, room_id, title, period_start)
SELECT v.topic_id, v.room_id, v.title, now()
FROM (VALUES
  ('room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education', '生成AIを児童生徒に何歳から使わせるべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education', '読書感想文や作文に生成AIを使うのは「ずる」か'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--gen-ai-education', '教師が校務に生成AIを使うことをどこまで認めるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--programming-education-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--programming-education', 'プログラミングは全児童生徒に必修とすべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--programming-education-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--programming-education', 'プログラミング教育の目的は論理的思考か、技能習得か'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--programming-education-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--programming-education', 'AIがコードを書く時代にプログラミングを学ぶ意味はあるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook', '紙の教科書を全面的にデジタルへ移行すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook', 'デジタル教科書は子どもの読解力に影響するか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--digital-textbook', 'デジタルと紙はどう使い分けるべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device', 'GIGA端末の家庭への持ち帰りを認めるべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device', '端末更新の費用を誰がどう負担すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--giga-one-device', '1人1台端末は本当に学力を高めたか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--school-dx-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--school-dx', '校務支援システムは教員の負担を減らしたか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--school-dx-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--school-dx', '保護者連絡をどこまでデジタル化すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--school-dx-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--school-dx', '出欠・成績データの一元管理はどこまで進めるべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education', '学習ログを指導にどこまで活用すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education', '学習データの蓄積は子どもの監視につながらないか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--data-driven-education', 'データに基づく個別指導は教師の勘より優れているか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption', '学校はEdTechサービスをどう選定すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption', '民間サービスへの依存はどこまで許容されるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--edtech-adoption', '無料サービスの利用に潜むリスクをどう考えるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning', 'オンライン授業は対面授業の代わりになるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning', 'ハイブリッド授業をどう設計すべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--online-remote-learning', '不登校児へのオンライン学習を出席扱いにすべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral', 'AIリテラシー教育は何歳から始めるべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral', 'フェイク情報への対応をどう教えるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--ai-literacy-moral', '情報モラル教育は学校と家庭のどちらが担うべきか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning-t1', 'room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning', '個別最適化学習は学びを豊かにするか、孤立させるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning-t2', 'room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning', 'アダプティブ教材と一斉授業をどう両立させるか'),
  ('room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning-t3', 'room-ai-technology--community--personalized-learning', '「最適化」を誰の基準で決めるべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test', '全国学力調査の結果を学校間で公開すべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test', '学力テストは教育の質を正しく測れるか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--national-achievement-test', 'テスト対策に偏った指導をどう防ぐか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation', '数値による成績評価は必要か'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation', '観点別評価は現場で機能しているか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--grade-evaluation', '評価の主目的は選別か、成長支援か'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform', '一発勝負の入試は公平か'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform', '総合型選抜（旧AO）をどこまで広げるべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--entrance-exam-reform', '入試にAI・デジタルツールの使用を認めるべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl', '探究学習は本当に学力を伸ばすか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl', '探究の成果をどう評価すべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--inquiry-pbl', '教科学習と探究学習のバランスをどう取るか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education', 'STEAM教育は文系・理系の枠を越えられるか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education', '芸術（Art）をSTEMに加える意義は何か'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--steam-education', 'STEAM教育に必要な教員をどう確保するか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy', 'デジタル時代に読解力をどう育てるか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy', '読書習慣を学校はどこまで促すべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--reading-literacy', '「正しく読む力」と「批判的に読む力」のどちらを重視すべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework', '宿題は必要か、あるとすればどうあるべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework', '宿題の丸つけ・管理は教師が担うべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--homework', '家庭環境による格差を宿題はどう助長するか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction', '習熟度別クラス編成は是か非か'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction', '習熟度別指導は格差を固定しないか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--mastery-based-instruction', 'できる子・つまずく子のどちらに重点を置くべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision', '学習指導要領は現場の自由度を奪っているか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision', '「詰め込み」と「ゆとり」のバランスをどう取るか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--course-of-study-revision', '次期改訂で何を増やし、何を減らすべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills-t1', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills', '非認知能力は学校で育てられるか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills-t2', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills', '非認知能力を評価することは可能か、すべきか'),
  ('room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills-t3', 'room-evaluation-curriculum--community--non-cognitive-skills', '認知能力と非認知能力のどちらを優先すべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance', '校則をどこまで子ども自身に決めさせるべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance', 'ブラック校則の見直しをどう進めるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-rules-guidance', '校則は何のために存在するのか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention', 'いじめの「重大事態」をどう線引きするか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention', '加害児童への指導と被害児童の保護をどう両立するか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--bullying-prevention', 'いじめ防止にAI・通報アプリは有効か'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support', '不登校の子に学校以外の学びをどこまで認めるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support', '「学校復帰」を支援の目標とすべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--school-refusal-support', '不登校を「問題」と捉える見方は適切か'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice', '子どもの声を学校運営にどう反映させるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice', '校則や行事の決定に子どもをどこまで関与させるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--children-rights-voice', '「子どもの権利」と「指導」はどう両立するか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns', 'スマホの校内持ち込みを認めるべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns', 'SNSトラブルに学校はどこまで介入すべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--smartphone-sns', 'デジタルとの付き合い方は誰が教えるべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code', '制服は必要か'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code', 'ジェンダーレス制服をどう導入するか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--uniform-dress-code', '服装の自由は学習に影響するか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities', '部活動の強制加入は是か非か'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities', '勝利至上主義をどう見直すか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--club-activities', '部活動は学校教育の一部であるべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health', '学校はメンタルヘルスにどこまで踏み込むべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health', 'スクールカウンセラーの役割をどう位置づけるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--mental-health', '「休む権利」を子どもに認めるべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection', '学校はどこまで家庭に介入すべきか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection', '虐待の早期発見に学校は何ができるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--child-abuse-protection', '通告の判断を教師が担う負担をどう考えるか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance-t1', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance', '厳しい指導と体罰の線引きをどこに置くか'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance-t2', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance', '「指導死」を防ぐために何が必要か'),
  ('room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance-t3', 'room-children-rights-discipline--community--corporal-punishment-guidance', '毅然とした指導はどこまで許されるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs', '障害のある子への合理的配慮をどこまで提供すべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs', '通常学級と特別支援学級の学びの場をどう考えるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--inclusive-special-needs', 'インクルーシブ教育を支える人員をどう確保するか')
) AS v(topic_id, room_id, title)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET room_id = EXCLUDED.room_id, title = EXCLUDED.title;
COMMIT;
